- run_id: fixture-resumed-repair-review
- checkpoint: completed
- resumed_from: fixture-legacy-fallback
- current_run_alerts: repair=needs-attention
- current_run_priority_artifact: __FIXTURE_ROOT__/artifacts/fixture-resumed-repair-review/REPAIR-RESULT.json [repair-result]
- current_run_priority_note: 最近异常更偏向 repair 结论，建议先看这个结果文件。

- lineage.is_resumed_run: True
- lineage.source_run_id: fixture-legacy-fallback
- lineage.source_checkpoint: completed
- lineage.source_resumed_from: 无
- lineage.resume_strategy: repair-review-first
- lineage.resume_strategy_reason: source repair result still needs operator review
[doctor] lineage 摘要
- 这是一轮 resumed run：当前运行继承自 fixture-legacy-fallback（source checkpoint: completed）。
- 源运行本身不是已记录的 resumed run，当前链路到此为止。
- 当前 resume 策略：repair-review-first。
- 触发原因：source repair result still needs operator review。
- 当前已解析到 2 段 lineage 链。
- 操作建议：优先查看 repair 结果与诊断摘要，确认应该 rollback 还是继续人工修复。
- 当前策略优先产物：__FIXTURE_ROOT__/artifacts/fixture-resumed-repair-review/REPAIR-RESULT.json [repair-result]
- 说明：当前 run 的 repair 结果仍需 operator review；应先看这一份，再决定 rollback 还是人工修复。
- 最近的异常祖先节点：fixture-legacy-fallback （repair=needs-attention）。
- 祖先参考产物：__FIXTURE_ROOT__/artifacts/fixture-legacy-fallback/REPAIR-RESULT.json [repair-result]
- 说明：最近异常更偏向 repair 结论，建议先看这个结果文件。
[doctor] lineage chain
- depth: 2
- 1. [current] fixture-resumed-repair-review (checkpoint=completed, final=success; strategy=repair-review-first; reason=source repair result still needs operator review; alerts=repair=needs-attention)
- 2. [ancestor-1] fixture-legacy-fallback (checkpoint=completed, final=success; strategy=fresh; reason=new-run; alerts=repair=needs-attention)
[doctor] 当前 run 异常摘要

- 说明：最近异常更偏向 repair 结论，建议先看这个结果文件。

- apply_execute: skipped
- repair: needs-attention
- rollback: ok
- final: success

- final_status: ok
- nginx_test.requested: False

- recovery.installer_status: success
- recovery.resume_strategy: dry-run-ok
- recovery.resume_recommended: True
- recovery.operator_action: review-plan

- final_status: needs-attention
- source_recovery.installer_status: needs-attention
- source_recovery.resume_recommended: False
- source_recovery.operator_action: rollback-or-fix
- execution.nginx_test_rerun_status: not-run

- mode: dry-run
- final_status: ok
- flags.execute: False

- entries: 2
- last_event: run.complete [success]
- last_message: installer completed
[doctor] 下一步建议
